stamina_manager.name: Stamina Manager
stamina_manager.description: Strategy: - Hyper-aware of stamina levels - Alternates aggressive and recovery phases - Teaches learning fighter to manage stamina as a resource - Uses recovery windows to advantage
stamina_manager.creator: system

dodger.name: Dodger
dodger.description: Master of dodge and counter who punishes aggressive opponents. Strategy: - Dodges incoming attacks then immediately counters - Creates openings through superior movement - Punishes overextension and exhaustion - Not just evasion - MUST counter-attack to win - Uses all stances tactically during counters - Forces contact through calculated strikes
dodger.creator: system

hit_and_run.name: Hit-and-Run
hit_and_run.description: Strategy: - Hits opponent then immediately backs away - Repeats hit-retreat cycle constantly - Teaches learning fighter dealing with mobile opponents - Forces learner to predict and catch opponents
hit_and_run.creator: system

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: Unstoppable force of pure aggression and fury. Strategy: - NEVER stops attacking - ignores stamina completely - Maximum aggression at all times - Extended stance ALWAYS for maximum damage - Never retreats, never defends, never hesitates - Highest collision count of all fighters - Forces opponents to deal with relentless pressure
berserker.creator: system

zoner.name: Zoner
zoner.description: Master of distance control who wins through calculated pokes. Strategy: - Controls optimal range (3-4m) and pokes consistently - Uses extended stance to maximize reach - Retreats only when opponent is too close (<2m) - Advances when opponent is too far (>4m) - Creates contact through positioning, not just running away - Punishes aggressive approaches
zoner.creator: system

balanced.name: Balanced
balanced.description: True balanced fighter that adapts stance and strategy based on situation. Strategy: - Switches between all stances tactically - Aggressive (extended) when winning - Defensive (defending) when losing - Neutral for repositioning and stamina recovery - Adapts distance based on stamina and HP - Never gives up - fights to the end
balanced.creator: system

grappler.name: Grappler
grappler.description: Master of in-fighting who dominates at point-blank range. Strategy: - Forces close-range combat relentlessly - Extended stance constantly at close range for maximum damage - "Sticks" to opponent like glue - Chases down runners with determination - Never gives opponent breathing room - High collision count through constant contact
grappler.creator: system

counter_puncher.name: Counter Puncher
counter_puncher.description: Strategy: - Waits for opponent to overextend - Punishes aggressive mistakes - Teaches learning fighter about timing, patience, and risk/reward - Uses defensive stance effectively
counter_puncher.creator: system

novice.name: Novice
novice.description: Difficulty: Level 4 Has the fundamentals: - Moves toward opponent - Uses extended stance at correct range - Basic stamina awareness - But: predictable, no adaptation, no defense
novice.creator: system

wanderer.name: Wanderer
wanderer.description: Difficulty: Level 2 (after training_dummy) Just wanders around randomly. Sometimes accidentally hits things. Good for learning that movement and positioning matter.
wanderer.creator: system

training_dummy.name: Training Dummy
training_dummy.description: Perfect first opponent for RL agents to learn against. Configure this as a 50kg fighter so it takes more damage.
training_dummy.creator: system

punching_bag.name: Punching Bag
punching_bag.description: Does absolutely nothing. Perfect for learning to approach and strike.
punching_bag.creator: system

dummy.name: Dummy Fighter
dummy.description: Just moves forward slowly with neutral stance.
dummy.creator: system

bumbler.name: Bumbler
bumbler.description: Difficulty: Level 3 Has basic combat instincts but terrible execution: - Moves toward opponent but not strategically - Uses extended stance but at wrong times - Doesn't manage stamina - No defensive awareness
bumbler.creator: system

champion.name: Trained Fighter
champion.description: Auto-generated wrapper for trained ONNX model.
champion.creator: population-training

tank.name: Tank
tank.description: A true defensive tank that stands its ground and outlasts opponents. Strategy: - Primary stance is "defending" for maximum damage reduction - Never retreats - stands ground and absorbs hits - Counter-attacks when opponent is close and vulnerable - Uses superior defense multiplier to win through attrition - Controls the center of the arena
tank.creator: system

rusher.name: Rusher
rusher.description: Relentless forward pressure with constant attacking stance. Strategy: - ALWAYS rushes forward with maximum aggression - Uses extended stance while advancing for reach advantage - Only stops to avoid wall damage - Never retreats - commits fully to offense - Overwhelms opponents with constant pressure
rusher.creator: system

laughing_nightingale_g2.creator: population-training
